compartments.name: V_LN
compartments.description: Lymph node (LN) compartment volume Volume of lumped tumor-draining lymph nodes calculated based on number of LNs (estimated) and average LN diameter (Schmidt 2007, PMID: 17724531)

compartments.name: V_e
compartments.description: APC endosomal comparment calculated based on the volume of a single endosome (Agrawal and Linderman 1996, PMID: 8944895) and the number of endosomes per cell (Agrawal and Linderman 1996, PMID: 8944895)

compartments.name: A_e
compartments.description: APC endosomal surface comparment calculated based on the surface area of a single endosome (Agrawal and Linderman 1996, PMID: 8944895) and the number of endosomes per cell (Agrawal and Linderman 1996, PMID: 8944895)

compartments.name: A_s
compartments.description: APC surface comparment (Agrawal and Linderman 1996, PMID: 8944895)

compartments.name: syn_T_C1
compartments.description: synapse comparment between T and C1 (Jansson 2005, PMID: 16034096)

compartments.name: syn_T_APC
compartments.description: synapse comparment between T and APC (Jansson 2005, PMID: 16034096)

compartments.name: syn_M_C
compartments.description: synapse comparment between macrophage and cancer cell (Jansson 2005, PMID: 16034096)

parameters.name: k_cell_clear
parameters.description: Rate of dead cell clearance from tumour compartment (estimated)

parameters.name: cell
parameters.description: unit parameter for calculation

parameters.name: day
parameters.description: unit parameter for calculation

parameters.name: vol_cell
parameters.description: Average volume of cancer cell Volume of a cancer cell calculated based on cancer cell diameter (Abramczyk 2015, PMID: 25730442)

parameters.name: vol_Tcell
parameters.description: Average volume of T cells Volume of a T cell calculated based on the average T cell diameter (Chapman 1981, PMID: 6975780)

parameters.name: Ve_T
parameters.description: Void fraction of the tumor (Finley 2012, PMID: 22547351)

parameters.name: C_total
parameters.description: Total number of cancer cells

parameters.name: T_total
parameters.description: Total number of activated T cells in tumor

parameters.name: T_total_LN
parameters.description: Total number of activated T cells in TDLNs

parameters.name: R_Tcell
parameters.description: Rate of cancer cell death

parameters.name: Tregs_
parameters.description: Total number of activated T cells in TDLNs

parameters.name: H_APC
parameters.description: Hill function of mAPC for self-antigen-specific Treg activation

parameters.name: H_mAPC
parameters.description: Hill function of mAPC for CD8 T cell activation

parameters.name: H_APCh
parameters.description: Hill function of mAPC for neoantigen-specific helper T cell activation

parameters.name: H_PD1_C1
parameters.description: Hill function of PDL1 on tumor cells for T cell exhaustion

parameters.name: H_PD1_APC
parameters.description: Hill function of PDL1 on APC for T cell exhaustion

parameters.name: H_CD28_C1
parameters.description: Hill function of CD28 on tumor cells

parameters.name: H_CD28_APC
parameters.description: Hill function of CD28 on APCs for T cell activation

parameters.name: k_C1_growth
parameters.description: Cancer cell growth rate (Ryu 2014, PMID: 24895040; Desai 2006, PMID: 16489089)

parameters.name: C_max
parameters.description: Cancer cell capacity (Desai 2006, PMID: 16489089)

parameters.name: k_C1_death
parameters.description: Cancer cell death rate from innate immune cells (Palsson 2013, PMID: 24074340)

parameters.name: k_C1_therapy
parameters.description: Rate of C1 killing by therapy (see Rules)

parameters.name: initial_tumour_diameter
parameters.description: Pre-treatment tumor diameter

parameters.name: k_K_g
parameters.description: Tumour vasculature growth rate (Desai 2006, PMID: 16489089)

parameters.name: k_K_d
parameters.description: Tumour vasculature inhibition rate (Desai 2006, PMID: 16489089; Hahnfeldt 1999, PMID: 10519381)

parameters.name: k_vas_Csec
parameters.description: Secretion rate of angiogenic factors by cancer cells (Volk 2008, PMID: 18516298)

parameters.name: k_vas_deg
parameters.description: Degradation rate of angiogenic factors (Finley 2011, PMID: 22104283)

parameters.name: c_vas_50
parameters.description: Half-maximal conc. of angiogenic factor on tumor capacity growth (Desai 2006, PMID: 16489089)

parameters.name: k_C2_growth
parameters.description: Cancer cell growth rate (Ryu 2014, PMID: 24895040; Desai 2006, PMID: 16489089)

parameters.name: k_C2_death
parameters.description: Cancer cell death rate from innate immune cells (Palsson 2013, PMID: 24074340)

parameters.name: k_C2_therapy
parameters.description: Rate of C2 killing by therapy (see Rules)

parameters.name: div_T0
parameters.description: T Cell Diversity (Robins 2009, PMID: 19706884)

parameters.name: n_T0_clones
parameters.description: Number of T cell clones (estimated)

parameters.name: q_nT0_LN_in
parameters.description: Rate of naive T cell transport into the LN  calculated based on the steady-state naive T cell level in healthy individuals (Autissier 2010, PMID: 20099249)

parameters.name: q_T0_LN_out
parameters.description: Rate of activated T cell transport out of the LN (De Boer and Perelson 1995, PMID: 7475092)

parameters.name: q_nT0_LN_out
parameters.description: Rate of naive T cell transport out of the LN (Mandl 2012, PMID: 23071319)

parameters.name: k_T0_act
parameters.description: T0 activation rate (De Boer and Perelson 1995, PMID: 7475092; Robertson-Tessi 2012, PMID: 22051568)

parameters.name: k_T0_pro
parameters.description: T0 proliferation rate (Marchingo 2014, PMID: 25430770)

parameters.name: k_T0_death
parameters.description: T0 death rate (De Boer and Perelson 1995, PMID: 7475092)

parameters.name: q_T0_P_in
parameters.description: rate of T0 transport into the peripheral compartment calculated based on T cell transmigration rate (Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023) and T cell adhesion density (Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023)

parameters.name: q_T0_P_out
parameters.description: rate of T0 transport out of the peripheral compartment (De Boer and Perelson 1995, PMID: 7475092)

parameters.name: q_T0_T_in
parameters.description: rate of T0 transport into the tumor compartment calculated based on T cell transmigration rate (Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023) and T cell adhesion density (Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023)

parameters.name: q_nT0_P_in
parameters.description: rate of nT0 transport into the peripheral compartment calculated based on T cell transmigration rate (Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023) and T cell adhesion density (Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023)

parameters.name: q_nT0_P_out
parameters.description: rate of nT0 transport out of the peripheral compartment  calculated based on steady-state naive T cell density in healthy individuals (Autissier 2010, PMID: 20099249)

parameters.name: Q_nT0_thym
parameters.description: Thymic output of nT0 (Bains 2009, PMID: 19179300; Yeh 2017, PMID: 28912973)

parameters.name: k_nT0_pro
parameters.description: rate of nT0 proliferation (Braber 2012, PMID: 22365666)

parameters.name: K_nT0_pro
parameters.description: half-maximal peripheral proliferation of of nT0 (Braber 2012, PMID: 22365666)

parameters.name: k_nT0_death
parameters.description: rate of nT0 death (Braber 2012, PMID: 22365666)

parameters.name: k_IL2_deg
parameters.description: rate of IL2 degradation (Lotze 1985, PMID: 3871099)

parameters.name: k_IL2_cons
parameters.description: rate of IL2 consumption by T cells (Lotze 1985, PMID: 3871099)

parameters.name: k_IL2_sec
parameters.description: rate of IL2 secretion from T cells (Han 2012, PMID: 22160692; Thurley 2015, PMID: 25923703; Liu 2001)

parameters.name: IL2_50
parameters.description: T cell activation half-maximal IL2 concentration (Marchingo 2014, PMID: 25430770)

parameters.name: IL2_50_Treg
parameters.description: Treg activation half-maximal IL2 concentration (Wang and Smith 1987, PMID: 3116143)

parameters.name: N0
parameters.description: numer of activated T cell generation by TCR signaling only(Marchingo 2014, PMID: 25430770)

parameters.name: N_costim
parameters.description: numer of activated T cell generation by co-stimulatory signaling only (Marchingo 2014, PMID: 25430770)

parameters.name: N_IL2_CD8
parameters.description: maximum number of activated T cell generations due to IL2 (Marchingo 2014, PMID: 25430770)

parameters.name: N_IL2_CD4
parameters.description: maximum number of activated T cell generations due to IL2 (Marchingo 2014, PMID: 25430770)

parameters.name: k_Treg
parameters.description: Rate of T cell death by Tregs (estimated)

parameters.name: H_P0
parameters.description: Hill function of tumor antigenP0

parameters.name: N_aT
parameters.description: Number of Activated CD8+ T Cell Generations

parameters.name: N_aT0
parameters.description: Number of Activated Treg Generations

parameters.name: div_T1
parameters.description: T Cell Diversity (Robins 2009, PMID: 19706884)

parameters.name: n_T1_clones
parameters.description: Number of T cell clones (Morisaki 2021 PMID: 34193879; Narang 2019, PMID: 30832597)

parameters.name: q_nT1_LN_in
parameters.description: Rate of naive T cell transport into the LN  calculated based on the steady-state naive T cell level in healthy individuals (Autissier 2010, PMID: 20099249)

parameters.name: q_T1_LN_out
parameters.description: Rate of activated T cell transport out of the LN (De Boer and Perelson 1995, PMID: 7475092)

parameters.name: q_nT1_LN_out
parameters.description: Rate of naive T cell transport out of the LN (Mandl 2012, PMID: 23071319)

parameters.name: k_T1_act
parameters.description: T1 activation rate (De Boer and Perelson 1995, PMID: 7475092; Robertson-Tessi 2012, PMID: 22051568)

parameters.name: k_T1_pro
parameters.description: T1 proliferation rate (Marchingo 2014, PMID: 25430770)

parameters.name: k_T1_death
parameters.description: T1 death rate (De Boer and Perelson 1995, PMID: 7475092)

parameters.name: q_T1_P_in
parameters.description: rate of T1 transport into the peripheral compartment calculated based on T cell transmigration rate (Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023) and T cell adhesion density (Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023)

parameters.name: q_T1_P_out
parameters.description: rate of T1 transport out of the peripheral compartment (De Boer and Perelson 1995, PMID: 7475092)

parameters.name: q_T1_T_in
parameters.description: rate of T1 transport into the tumor compartment calculated based on T cell transmigration rate (Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023) and T cell adhesion density (Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023)

parameters.name: q_nT1_P_in
parameters.description: rate of nT1 transport into the peripheral compartment calculated based on T cell transmigration rate (Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023) and T cell adhesion density (Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023)

parameters.name: q_nT1_P_out
parameters.description: rate of nT1 transport out of the peripheral compartment  calculated based on steady-state naive T cell density in healthy individuals (Autissier 2010, PMID: 20099249)

parameters.name: Q_nT1_thym
parameters.description: Thymic output of nT1 (Bains 2009, PMID: 19179300; Ye 2002, PMID: 11994448)

parameters.name: k_nT1_pro
parameters.description: rate of nT1 proliferation (Braber 2012, PMID: 22365666)

parameters.name: K_nT1_pro
parameters.description: half-maximal peripheral proliferation of of nT1 (Braber 2012, PMID: 22365666)

parameters.name: k_nT1_death
parameters.description: rate of nT1 death (Braber 2012, PMID: 22365666)

parameters.name: k_T1
parameters.description: Rate of T cell exhaustion by cancer cells (estimated)

parameters.name: k_C_T1
parameters.description: Rate of cancer cell death by T cells (Robertson-Tessi 2012, PMID: 22051568)

parameters.name: k_IFNg_Tsec
parameters.description: rate of IFNg secretion from CD8 T cells (Autenshlyus 2021, PMID: 34059727; Borj 2017, doi:10.15171/ijbms.2017.05)

parameters.name: H_P1
parameters.description: Hill function of tumor antigen P1

parameters.name: K_T_C
parameters.description: Dependence of Teff killing rate on Teff/C ratio (Robertson-Tessi 2012, PMID: 22051568)

parameters.name: K_T_Treg
parameters.description: Dependence of Teff killing rate on Teff/Treg ratio (Robertson-Tessi 2012, PMID: 22051568)

parameters.name: k_APC_mat
parameters.description: Maximum rate of APC maturation (Chen 2014, PMID: 25184733)

parameters.name: k_APC_mig
parameters.description: Rate of APC migration (Russo Halin 2016, PMID: 26876174)

parameters.name: k_APC_death
parameters.description: Rate of APC death (Marino and Kirschner 2004, PMID: 15038983)

parameters.name: k_mAPC_death
parameters.description: Rate of mAPC death(Marino and Kirschner 2004, PMID: 15038983)

parameters.name: APC0_T
parameters.description: Steady state density of CD103+ APCs in the tumor, calculated to fit basal APC equal to 26000/cm^3 from (Lavin 2017, PMID: 28475900)

parameters.name: APC0_LN
parameters.description: Steady state density of all APC subtypes in the LN (Catron 2004, PMID: 15357945)- divided by 10 to only take CD103+ based on (Lavin 2017, PMID: 28475900)

parameters.name: n_sites_APC
parameters.description: Maxium number of T Cells an APC can interact with (De Boer and Perelson 1995, PMID: 7475092)

parameters.name: kin
parameters.description: Rate of MHC internalization (Chen 2014, PMID: 25184733)

parameters.name: kout
parameters.description: Rate of MHC externalization (Chen 2014, PMID: 25184733)

parameters.name: k_P0_up
parameters.description: Rate of antigen uptake by APCs (Chen 2014, PMID: 25184733)

parameters.name: k_xP0_deg
parameters.description: Rate of extracellular antigen degradation (Palsson 2013, PMID: 24074340)

parameters.name: k_P0_deg
parameters.description: Rate of endosomal antigen degradation (Chen 2014, PMID: 25184733)

parameters.name: k_p0_deg
parameters.description: Rate of endosomal epitope degradation (Chen 2014, PMID: 25184733)

parameters.name: k_P0_on
parameters.description: Rate of antigen-MHC binding (Agrawal and Linderman 1996, PMID: 8944895)

parameters.name: k_P0_d1
parameters.description: Antigen-MHC kd (Stone 2015, PMID: 25618219)

parameters.name: p0_50
parameters.description: calculated based on the number of molecules for half-maximal T cell activation (Kimachi 1997, PMID: 9464819) and synapse surface area

parameters.name: P0_C1
parameters.description: Concentration of P0 in C1 (estimated by 2.7e6 proteins/um^3 in a cancer cell (Milo 2013, PMID: 24114984) * cancer cell volume / Avogadro constant)

parameters.name: P0_C2
parameters.description: Concentration of P0 in C2 (estimated by 2.7e6 proteins/um^3 in a cancer cell (Milo 2013, PMID: 24114984) * cancer cell volume / Avogadro constant)

parameters.name: A_syn
parameters.description: Surface area of the synapse (Jansson 2005, PMID: 16034096)

parameters.name: A_Tcell
parameters.description: Surface area of the T cell calculated based on the average T cell diameter (Chapman 1981, PMID: 6975780)

parameters.name: A_cell
parameters.description: Surface area of the Cancer cell calculated based on the average cancer cell diameter (Abramczyk 2015, PMID: 25730442)

parameters.name: A_APC
parameters.description: Surface area of the APC (Agrawal and Linderman 1996, PMID: 8944895)

parameters.name: d_syn
parameters.description: The synapse gap distance (kd2D = kd3D*d_syn) (Jansson 2005, PMID: 16034096)

parameters.name: k_M1p0_TCR_on
parameters.description: Rate of TCR binding to MHC-peptide complex (Lever 2014, PMID: 25145757)

parameters.name: k_M1p0_TCR_off
parameters.description: Rate of TCR unbinding from MHC-peptide complex (Lever 2014, PMID: 25145757)

parameters.name: k_M1p0_TCR_p
parameters.description: Rate of MHC-peptide-TCR complex modification (Lever 2014, PMID: 25145757)

parameters.name: phi_M1p0_TCR
parameters.description: Rate of MHC-peptide-TCR complex with maximal modification that leads to non-signaling(Lever 2014, PMID: 25145757)

parameters.name: N_M1p0_TCR
parameters.description: Number of modifcation steps for MHC-peptide-TCR complex (Lever 2014, PMID: 25145757)

parameters.name: TCR_p0_tot
parameters.description: Total number of TCR molecules per naive T cell calculated based on the number of molecules for TCR (Lever 2014, PMID: 25145757) and T cell surface area

parameters.name: pTCR_p0_MHC_tot
parameters.description: Total number of MHC-p0-TCR complexes of all different activation levels (see Rules)

parameters.name: k_P1_up
parameters.description: Rate of antigen uptake by APCs (Chen 2014, PMID: 25184733)

parameters.name: k_xP1_deg
parameters.description: Rate of extracellular antigen degradation (Palsson 2013, PMID: 24074340)

parameters.name: k_P1_deg
parameters.description: Rate of endosomal antigen degradation (Chen 2014, PMID: 25184733)

parameters.name: k_p1_deg
parameters.description: Rate of endosomal epitope degradation (Chen 2014, PMID: 25184733)

parameters.name: k_P1_on
parameters.description: Rate of antigen-MHC binding (Agrawal and Linderman 1996, PMID: 8944895)

parameters.name: k_P1_d1
parameters.description: Antigen-MHC kd (Stone 2015, PMID: 25618219)

parameters.name: p1_50
parameters.description: calculated based on the number of molecules for half-maximal T cell activation (Kimachi 1997, PMID: 9464819) and synapse surface area

parameters.name: P1_C1
parameters.description: Concentration of P1 in C1 (estimated by 2.7e6 proteins/um^3 in a cancer cell (Milo 2013, PMID: 24114984) * cancer cell volume / Avogadro constant)

parameters.name: P1_C2
parameters.description: Concentration of P1 in C2 (estimated by 2.7e6 proteins/um^3 in a cancer cell (Milo 2013, PMID: 24114984) * cancer cell volume / Avogadro constant)

parameters.name: k_M1p1_TCR_on
parameters.description: Rate of TCR binding to MHC-peptide complex (Lever 2014, PMID: 25145757)

parameters.name: k_M1p1_TCR_off
parameters.description: Rate of TCR unbinding from MHC-peptide complex (Lever 2014, PMID: 25145757)

parameters.name: k_M1p1_TCR_p
parameters.description: Rate of MHC-peptide-TCR complex modification (Lever 2014, PMID: 25145757)

parameters.name: phi_M1p1_TCR
parameters.description: Rate of MHC-peptide-TCR complex with maximal modification that leads to non-signaling(Lever 2014, PMID: 25145757)

parameters.name: N_M1p1_TCR
parameters.description: Number of modifcation steps for MHC-peptide-TCR complex (Lever 2014, PMID: 25145757)

parameters.name: TCR_p1_tot
parameters.description: Total number of TCR molecules per naive T cell calculated based on the number of molecules for TCR (Lever 2014, PMID: 25145757) and T cell surface area

parameters.name: pTCR_p1_MHC_tot
parameters.description: Total number of MHC-p1-TCR complexes of all different activation levels (see Rules)

parameters.name: q_P_aPD1
parameters.description: Capillary filtration rate of aPD1 between central and peripheral compartment(Ahamadi 2016, PMID: 27863186)

parameters.name: q_T_aPD1
parameters.description: Capillary filtration rate of aPD1 between central and tumor compartment(Wang 2019, PMID: 31218069)

parameters.name: q_LN_aPD1
parameters.description: Capillary filtration rate of aPD1 between central and TDLN compartment(Meijer 2017, PMID: 28510992)

parameters.name: q_LD_aPD1
parameters.description: Rate of lymphatic drainage of aPD1 from TDLN to central compartment(Zhu 1996, PMID: 8706023)

parameters.name: kon_PD1_PDL1
parameters.description: kon of PD1-PDL1 binding kon for PD1-PDL1 (Cheng 2013, PMID: 23417675)

parameters.description: Expression rate of PDL1 on tumor cells (Mimura 2018, PMID: 29034543)

parameters.name: k_in_PDL1
parameters.description: Degradation rate of PDL1 on tumor cells (Hsu 2018, PMID: 30442814)

parameters.name: r_PDL1_IFNg
parameters.description: Number of folds increase of PDL1 expression by IFNg (Shin 2017, PMID: 27903500)

parameters.description: kon of PD1-PDL2 binding (Cheng 2013, PMID: 23417675)

parameters.description: kon of PD1-aPD1 binding (Wang 2014, PMID: 24872026; Brown 2020, PMID: 32134960)

parameters.description: kon of PDL1-aPDL1 binding (Wang 2014, PMID: 24872026)

parameters.description: kon of CD28-CD80 binding (van der Merwe 1997, PMID: 9053440)

parameters.description: koff of PD1-PDL2 binding calculated based on the measured kd and kon (Cheng 2013, PMID: 23417675)

parameters.description: koff of PD1-aPD1 binding calculated based on the measured kd and kon (Wang 2014, PMID: 24872026; Brown 2020, PMID: 32134960)

parameters.name: koff_PDL1_aPDL1
parameters.description: koff of PDL1-aPDL1 binding calculated based on the measured kd and kon (Wang 2014, PMID: 24872026)

parameters.name: koff_CD28_CD80
parameters.description: koff of CD28-CD80 binding calculated based on the measured kd and kon (van der Merwe 1997, PMID: 9053440)

parameters.name: koff_CD28_CD86
parameters.description: koff of CD28-CD86 binding calculated based on the measured kd and kon (Collins 2002, PMID: 12196291)

parameters.name: koff_CTLA4_CD80
parameters.description: koff of CTLA4-CD80 binding calculated based on the measured kd and kon (van der Merwe 1997, PMID: 9053440)

parameters.name: koff_CTLA4_CD86
parameters.description: koff of CTLA4-CD86 binding calculated based on the measured kd and kon (Jansson 2005, PMID: 16034096; Collins 2002, PMID: 12196291)

parameters.name: koff_CD80_PDL1
parameters.description: koff of CD80-PDL1 binding calculated based on the measured kd and kon (Cheng 2014, PMID: 23417675; Butte 2008, PMID: 18585785)

parameters.name: koff_CTLA4_aCTLA4
parameters.description: koff of CTLA4-aCTLA4 binding calculated based on the measured kd and kon (Wang 2014, PMID: 24872026)

parameters.description: koff of CD80 self-association calculated based on the measured kd and kon (Ikemizu 2000, PMID: 10661405)

parameters.name: Chi_PD1_aPD1
parameters.description: Antibody cross-arm binding efficiency that also includes the conversion of kon from 3D to 2D (estimated based on Wang 2014, PMID: 24872026)

parameters.name: Chi_PDL1_aPDL1
parameters.description: Antibody cross-arm binding efficiency that also includes the conversion of kon from 3D to 2D (Wang 2014, PMID: 24872026)

parameters.name: Chi_CTLA4_aCTLA4
parameters.description: Antibody cross-arm binding efficiency that also includes the conversion of kon from 3D to 2D (estimated)

parameters.name: PD1_50
parameters.description: PD1/PDL1 concentration for half-maximal T cell inactivation (Jafarnejad 2019, PMID: 31236847)

parameters.name: n_PD1
parameters.description: Hill coefficient for PD1/PDL1 half-maximal T cell inactivation (estimated)

parameters.name: CD28_CD8X_50
parameters.description: CD28-CD80/CD28-CD86 concentration for half-maximal T cell co-estimulation estimated assuming T cell activation is inhibited by 70% at baseline CTLA-4 expression (Parry 2005, PMID: 16227604)

parameters.name: n_CD28_CD8X
parameters.description: Hill coefficient for CD28-CD80/CD28-CD86 half-maximal T cell co-estimulation (estimated)

parameters.name: T_PD1_total
parameters.description: concentration of PD1 on T cells (Cheng 2014, PMID: 23417675; Mkrtichyan 2012, PMID: 22837483; Gatalica 2014, PMID: 25392179)

parameters.name: T_CD28_total
parameters.description: concentration of CD28 on T cells (Jansson 2005, PMID: 16034096)

parameters.name: T_CTLA4_syn
parameters.description: concentration of CTLA4 on T cells (Jansson 2005, PMID: 16034096)

parameters.name: T_PDL1_total
parameters.description: concentration of PDL1 on T cells (Cheng 2014, PMID: 23417675; Mkrtichyan 2012, PMID: 22837483; Gatalica 2014, PMID: 25392179)

parameters.name: C1_PDL1_base
parameters.description: baseline number of PDL1 molecules per C1 cell (Cheng 2014, PMID: 23417675; Mkrtichyan 2012, PMID: 22837483; Shin 2017, PMID: 27903500; Gatalica 2014, PMID: 25392179)

parameters.name: r_PDL2C1
parameters.description: PDL2/PDL1 molecule ratio on C1 cell (Cheng 2014, PMID: 23417675)

parameters.name: C1_CD80_total
parameters.description: number of CD80 molecules per C1 cell (Jansson 2005, PMID: 16034096)

parameters.name: C1_CD86_total
parameters.description: number of CD86 molecules per C1 cell (Jansson 2005, PMID: 16034096)

parameters.name: APC_PDL1_base
parameters.description: baseline number of PDL1 molecules per APC cell (Cheng 2014, PMID: 23417675; Mkrtichyan 2012, PMID: 22837483; Shin 2017, PMID: 27903500; Gatalica 2014, PMID: 25392179)

parameters.name: r_PDL2APC
parameters.description: PDL2/PDL1 molecule ratio on APC cell (Cheng 2014, PMID: 23417675)

parameters.name: APC_CD80_total
parameters.description: number of CD80 molecules per APC cell (Jansson 2005, PMID: 16034096)

parameters.name: APC_CD86_total
parameters.description: number of CD86 molecules per APC cell (Jansson 2005, PMID: 16034096)

parameters.name: k_Th_act
parameters.description: Rate of T helper cell activation (Robertson-Tessi 2012, PMID: 22051568)

parameters.name: k_Th_Treg
parameters.description: Th differentiation rate to Treg (Robertson-Tessi 2012, PMID: 22051568)

parameters.name: k_TGFb_Tsec
parameters.description: TGF secretion rate by Treg (Liyanage 2002, PMID: 12193750)

parameters.name: k_TGFb_deg
parameters.description: TGF degradtion rate (Robertson-Tessi 2012, PMID: 22051568)

parameters.name: TGFb_50
parameters.description: Half-Maximal TGFb level for Th-to-Treg differentiation / chemoresistance development / M1-to-M2 polarization (Robertson-Tessi 2012, PMID: 22051568)

parameters.name: TGFb_50_Teff
parameters.description: Half-Maximal TGFb level for CD8 T cell inhibition (Robertson-Tessi 2012, PMID: 22051568)

parameters.name: Kc_rec
parameters.description: Half-Maximal cancer cell number for T cell recruitment (Phillis 2006, PMID: 16153659)

parameters.name: TGFbase
parameters.description: Baseline TGFb level in breast tumor (Ivanović 2003, PMID: 12751375; Manuyakorn 2008, PMID: 19317336; Panis 2013, PMID: 23393376)

parameters.name: k_IFNg_Thsec
parameters.description: IFNg secretion rate by T helper cell estimated assuming IFNg secretion is 3 times lower in CD4 than CD8 T cells (Kasahara 1983, PMID: 6403613)

parameters.name: k_IFNg_deg
parameters.description: IFNg degradation rate (Hofstra 1998, PMID: 9806748)

parameters.name: IFNg_50_ind
parameters.description: Half-Maximal IFNg level for PD-L1 induction (Shin 2017, PMID: 27903500)

parameters.name: H_TGFb
parameters.description: Hill function of TGFb for Th-to-Treg differentiation / chemoresistance development / M1-to-M2 polarization

parameters.name: H_TGFb_Teff
parameters.description: Hill function of TGFb for Teff inhibition and chemoresistance development

parameters.name: N_aTh
parameters.description: Number of Activated T Helper Cell Generations (see Rules)

parameters.name: k_CCL2_sec
parameters.description: rate of CCL2 secretion (Huang 2007, PMID: 17257744; Dutta 2018, PMID: 29594759)

parameters.name: k_CCL2_deg
parameters.description: rate of CCL2 degradation (Tanimoto 2007, PMID: 18089573)

parameters.name: CCL2_50
parameters.description: Half-maximal CCL2 level of MDSC recruitment (Opalek 2007, PMID: 17888174; Ernst 1994, PMID: 8144933)

parameters.name: k_MDSC_rec
parameters.description: Rate of MDSC recruitment into the tumor (Diaz-Montero 2009, PMID: 18446337; Huang 2006, PMID: 17257744)

parameters.name: k_MDSC_death
parameters.description: Rate of MDSC death (Lai 2018, PMID: 29735668)

parameters.name: k_NO_deg
parameters.description: rate of NO degradation (Hakim 1996, PMID: 8953625)

parameters.name: k_ArgI_deg
parameters.description: rate of ArgI degradation (Schimke 1964, PMID: 14257612)

parameters.name: k_NO_sec
parameters.description: rate of NO secretion from MDSCs (Serafini 2008, PMID: 18593947)

parameters.name: k_ArgI_sec
parameters.description: rate of ArgI secretion (Serafini 2008, PMID: 18593947)

parameters.name: ArgI_50_Teff
parameters.description: rate of ArgI-induced T cell death (Serafini 2008, PMID: 18593947)

parameters.name: NO_50_Teff
parameters.description: rate of NO-induced T cell death (Serafini 2008, PMID: 18593947)

parameters.name: ArgI_50_Treg
parameters.description: Half-maximal ArgI level of Treg expansion (estimated based on Serafini 2008, PMID: 18593947)

parameters.name: H_NO
parameters.description: Hill function for NO-mediated inhibition on Teff

parameters.name: H_ArgI_Teff
parameters.description: Hill function for ariginase I-mediated inhibition on Teff

parameters.name: H_ArgI_Treg
parameters.description: Hill function for ariginase I-mediated Th-to-Treg transdifferentiation

parameters.name: H_MDSC
parameters.description: Hill function for overall effect of MDSC-mediated effect on Teff

parameters.name: Vmcl
parameters.description: Maximum elimination rate of nab-paclitaxel from the central compartment V1

parameters.name: Kcl
parameters.description: Nab-paclitaxel concentration in the central compartment V1 at 50% Vmcl

parameters.name: Q2
parameters.description: Intercompartmental clearance between the central compartment V1 and the second peripheral compartment V3

parameters.name: Vmt
parameters.description: Maximum intercompartmental distribution rate between the central compartment V1 and the first peripheral compartment V2

parameters.name: Kt
parameters.description: Nab-paclitaxel concentration in the central compartment V1 at 50% Vmt

parameters.name: BSA
parameters.description: Body surface area

parameters.name: r_nabp
parameters.description: Tumour to plasma concentration ratio of nab-paclitaxel (Yang 2007, PMID: 17828616; Rajeshkumar 2016, PMID: 27441498)

parameters.name: k_C_nabp
parameters.description: Cancer cell killing rate by nab-paclitaxel (Choi 2012, PMID: 23023313; Volk 2008, PMID: 18516298; Kozłowska 2018, PMID: 29769198)

parameters.name: IC50_nabp
parameters.description: Half-maximal nab-paclitaxel concentration for cancer cell killing (Yang 2013, PMID: 23180760)

parameters.name: MW_nabp
parameters.description: Molecular weight of nab-paclitaxel (calculated)

parameters.name: Kc_nabp
parameters.description: Half-Maximal cancer cell number for cytotoxic drug diffusion (estimated based on Kyle 2007, PMID: 17473214)

parameters.name: k_C_resist
parameters.description: Cancer resistance to nab-paclitaxel (estimated)

parameters.name: r_resist
parameters.description: Number of folds increase of nab-paclitaxel EC50 in resistant cancer clones (Nemcova-Furstova 2016, PMID: 27664577)

parameters.name: k_vas_nabp
parameters.description: Secretion rate of angiogenic factors induced by nab-paclitaxel (Volk 2008, PMID: 18516298)

parameters.name: IC50_nabp_vas
parameters.description: Half-maximal conc. of nab-paclitaxel on angiogenic factor induction (Volk 2008, PMID: 18516298)

parameters.name: k_K_nabp
parameters.description: Inhibition rate of maximal tumor capacity by nab-paclitaxel (Mollard 2017, PMID: 28416742)

parameters.name: k_Mac_rec
parameters.description: Recruitment rate of macrophage into tumor compartment (Yang 2018, PMID: 30026826)

parameters.name: k_Mac_death
parameters.description: Death rate of macrophages into tumor compartment (Ginhoux 2016, PMID: 26982352)

parameters.name: k_TGFb_Msec
parameters.description: Secretion rate of TGFb by macrophage in tumor compartment (Matsuo 2000, PMID: 10652049)

parameters.name: k_IL12_sec
parameters.description: Secretion rate of IL-12 by mAPC in tumor compartment (Heufler 1996, PMID: 8605935)

parameters.name: k_IL12_Msec
parameters.description: Secretion rate of IL-12 by macrophage in tumor compartment (Clough 2007, PMID: 17597818; Sica 2000, PMID: 10623821)

parameters.name: k_IL12_deg
parameters.description: Degradation rate of IL-12 in tumor compartment (Carreño 2000, PMID: 10707873)

parameters.name: k_IL10_sec
parameters.description: Secretion rate of IL-10 by macrophage in tumor compartment (Autenshlyus 2021, PMID: 34059727)

parameters.name: k_IL10_deg
parameters.description: Degradation rate of IL-10 in tumor compartment (Saxena 2015, PMID: 25481648)

parameters.name: k_M2_pol
parameters.description: Rate of M1 to M2 macrophage polarization (estimated assuming that polarization takes roughly 2-3 days)

parameters.name: k_M1_pol
parameters.description: Rate of M2 to M1 macrophage polarization (estimated based on the M1/M2 ratio)

parameters.name: IL10_50
parameters.description: Half-maximal IL10 level for M1 to M2 polarization / maintaining Treg function / mAPC inhibition (*STAT6 related) (Altan-Bonnet 2019, PMID: 30770905)

parameters.name: IL12_50
parameters.description: Half-maximal IL-12 level for M2 to M1 macrophage polarization (Altan-Bonnet 2019, PMID: 30770905)

parameters.name: IFNg_50
parameters.description: Half-maximal IFNg level for M2 to M1 macrophage polarization (Altan-Bonnet 2019, PMID: 30770905)

parameters.name: k_M1_phago
parameters.description: Rate of M1 macrophage-mediated killing of cancer cell (Pan 2020, PMID: 33365025)

parameters.name: vol_Mcell
parameters.description: Volume of a single macrophage cell Volume of a macrophage calculated based on the average macrophage diameter (Krombach 1997, PMID: 9400735)

parameters.name: k_vas_Msec
parameters.description: Secretion rate of angiogenic factor by macrophage in tumor compartment (Wu 2010, PMID: 20692534)

parameters.name: kdeg_CD47
parameters.description: Degradation rate of free CD47 on RBCs (fitted)

parameters.name: kon_CD47_SIRPa
parameters.description: kon of CD47-SIRPa binding (Hayes 2020, PMID: 31964705)

parameters.name: koff_CD47_SIRPa
parameters.description: koff of CD47-SIRPa binding (Hayes 2020, PMID: 31964705)

parameters.name: SIRPa_50
parameters.description: SIRPa occupancy for half-maximal CD47/SIRPa inhibition on phagocytosis of cancer cells by macrophages (Willingham 2012, PMID: 22451913)

parameters.name: n_SIRPa
parameters.description: Hill coefficient for CD47/SIRPa inhibition on phagocytosis of cancer cells by macrophages (estimated)

parameters.name: H_Mac_C
parameters.description: Hill function for overall checkpoint inhibition on phagocytosis of cancer cell by macrophage

parameters.name: H_PD1_M
parameters.description: Hill function for PD1-mediated inhibition on phagocytosis of cancer cell by macrophage

parameters.name: H_SIRPa
parameters.description: Hill function for SIRPa-mediated inhibition on phagocytosis of cancer cell by macrophage

parameters.name: C_CD47
parameters.description: CD47 expression on cancer cells (Morrissey 2020, PMID: 32768386)

parameters.name: M_PD1_total
parameters.description: PD-1 expression on macrophages estimated based on PD-1 expression on T cell (Cheng 2014, PMID: 23417675; Mkrtichyan 2012, PMID: 22837483) and adjusted to fit its inhibitory effect on phagocytosis (Gordon 2017, PMID: 28514441)

parameters.name: M_SIRPa
parameters.description: SIRPa expression on macrophages (Subramanian 2006, PMID: 16291597)

parameters.name: A_Mcell
parameters.description: Surface area of the macrophage calculated based on the average macrophage diameter (Krombach 1997, PMID: 9400735)

parameters.name: IL10_50_phago
parameters.description: Half-maximal IL-10 level for phagocytosis by macrophage (Bian 2016, PMID: 27578867)

parameters.name: K_Mac_C
parameters.description: Association coefficient for macrophage and cancer cell (estimated)

parameters.name: M_total
parameters.description: Total number of macrophages

parameters.name: H_IL10
parameters.description: Hill function for IL10-mediated M2-like macrophage polarization / Treg functionality / inhibition on Ag presentaion

parameters.name: H_IL10_phago
parameters.description: Hill function for IL10-mediated inhibition on phagocytosis

parameters.name: H_IL12
parameters.description: Hill function for IL12
